description: UVM verification environment wrapping the AXI4 wide interconnect. Each AXI4 env (reusable across all ports) contains five per-channel agents (AW, W, B for write; AR, R for read), per-env sequences and scoreboards. Agents are grouped into AXI4 Env encapsulation boxes. The interconnect is the central routing element.

testbench.description: Top-level UVM testbench for AXI4 interconnect verification.

axi4_interconnect.description: AXI4 Crossbar Interconnect — routes master transactions to slave ports

uvm_read_scoreboard.description: Read scoreboard — checks AR/R channel transactions

ports.name: analysis_export
ports.description: TLM analysis export for read transactions

uvm_write_scoreboard.description: Write scoreboard — checks AW/W/B channel transactions

ports.name: analysis_export
ports.description: TLM analysis export for write transactions

instances.description: AXI4 crossbar interconnect — routes master transactions to slave ports

CPU read scoreboard — checks AR→R transactions
CPU write scoreboard — checks AW+W→B transactions

SPI write scoreboard — checks AW+W→B transactions
